description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a two-story main structure and an attached single-story section, featuring a combination of gable and hip roofs. The front facade includes a covered entryway with a small porch, a prominent garage, and a landscaped yard with a tree and pathway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a green lawn, a swimming pool, and a patio area, as well as a play structure and outdoor seating. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a mix of light gray, white, and natural wood accents. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the driveway leads directly to the garage.
description: A modern two-story suburban house with a garage, landscaped front yard, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior combines light gray, white, and wood accents with a mix of gable and hip roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, landscaped yard, and pathway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, side windows, backyard lawn, pool, and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, play structure, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the house, backyard, pool, and additional outdoor features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, small porch, and a single front door adjacent to the garage
